title: Madhukesvara temple
tagline: Madhukesvara temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Banavasi Madhukeshwara Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.
overview.description: Banavasi Madhukeshwara Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva. It is located in Banavasi, which is in Karnataka State of India, 24 km (15 mi) away from the nearest city, Sirsi.

topPlaces.name: Banavasi
topPlaces.description: Banavasi is an ancient temple town located near Sirsi in Karnataka. Banavasi was the ancient capital of the Kadamba dynasty that ruled all of modern-day Karnataka state.

topPlaces.name: Ajjarni
topPlaces.description: Ajjarni is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sirsi taluk of Uttara Kannada district.

topPlaces.name: Jade, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Jade is a village in Karnataka, located 30 km (19 mi) away from Sirsi.

topPlaces.name: Tumarikoppa
topPlaces.description: Tumarikoppa is a village in Dharwad district of Karnataka, India.

items.note: Banavasi is an ancient temple town located near Sirsi in Karnataka. Banavasi was the ancient capital of the Kadamba dynasty that ruled all of modern-day Karnataka state.
Ajjarni is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sirsi taluk of Uttara Kannada district.
Jade is a village in Karnataka, located 30 km (19 mi) away from Sirsi.
Tumarikoppa is a village in Dharwad district of Karnataka, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Madhukesvara temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Madhukesvara temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Madhukesvara temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (91 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Madhukesvara temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Madhukesvara temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Madhukesvara temple?
faq.a: Stays in Madhukesvara temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Madhukesvara temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Banavasi, Ajjarni, Jade, Karnataka, Tumarikoppa.
